pipeline_stages.name: collection
pipeline_stages.description: Collect public source rows without commercial filtering.

pipeline_stages.name: normalization
pipeline_stages.description: Normalize port calls, vessel identity keys, GT, time fields, type groups, and source confidence.

pipeline_stages.name: enrichment
pipeline_stages.description: Attach reference dictionaries, vessel master cache, pilot, PNC, Ulsan, berth, operator, and contact intelligence.

pipeline_stages.name: scoring
pipeline_stages.description: Single production commercial scoring and candidate classification engine.

candidateRules.immediate_target: commercial_value_score >= 75 plus current or near-term work feasibility

pipeline_stages.name: prediction
pipeline_stages.description: Generate arrival, anchorage, work-window, cleaning-opportunity, and fleet forecasts after scoring.

pipeline_stages.name: persistence
pipeline_stages.description: Persist run state, active pointers, daily warehouse rows, and raw archive pointers.

retention.raw_payloads: Google Drive archive, not Supabase long-term storage

pipeline_stages.name: reporting
pipeline_stages.description: Publish dashboard summaries, diagnostics, health reports, and small static fallbacks.

source_of_truth_tables.port_call_master: Unique port visit and commercial opportunity context.
source_of_truth_tables.daily_snapshot_tables: Long-term intelligence warehouse, retained separately from short-lived run snapshots.

config_types.csv_registry: port/source metadata from data/reference CSV files

backend_architecture.production_serving_rule: Dashboard APIs read the latest active dataset via active_dataset_pointer; generated no_live_data JSON must not replace promoted production data.

rank_diagnostics.rank_basis: commercial_value_score desc within global and normalized port groups

size_policy.strategy: keep active run plus latest promoted run, archive/fallback outside Supabase
